description: Now-extinct family that produced Dracula; served as noble breeding stock and swore Blood Oaths to the Tzimisce.
weakness: Allergic to garlic (in DAV20: also repelled by holy symbols)

description: The muscle/enforcers of the main Tzimisce families; hound-keepers, trackers, kennel masters raising war-beasts; savage, animalistic, rage-prone fighters who rarely mingle socially and follow Paths/Roads.
Now-extinct family descended from Shadow Lords Kinfolk; destroyed by the Tzimisce.
weakness: Enemies (Shadow Lords); aggravated damage from silver; aversion to wolfsbane; bestial under full moon (DAV20: only aggravated from silver)

description: Most important and 'human-facing' family; liaisons to mortal society, manage estates/finance/politics, enforce Sabbat Masquerade; relatively independent, some plot freedom; seen as soft by others.
weakness: Blood bound to bishops/archbishops (Dark Ages: blood pool of 8 instead of 10)

description: Revenant line serving the priests of Zirnitra.
weakness: Cannot replenish Willpower unless near the Carpathians/Alps or carrying earth/stone from those ranges

description: Pale albino line that exclusively served the methuselah Byelobog.
weakness: Nocturnal; skin peels in direct sunlight

description: Possibly the oldest family (tracing to ancient Constantinople); scholars, occultists, Noddist researchers; high esteem, source of many Embraced Tzimisce (e.g. Sascha Vykos was formerly Obertus).
weakness: Derangement (Obsessive); Narov line variant has Megalomania

description: Originated as secret police of Ivan the Terrible; 'rescued' by Tzimisce; serve independent Russian Tzimisce, not widely known in the clan.
Decadent, wealthy, hedonistic socialites; cultural link to mortal world; pursue extreme pleasures and sensations; reckless with humans; least controlled of the families.
weakness: Easily obsessed with pleasure/sensation and become addicted

description: Ancient family owned by the Baali bloodline.
weakness: +2 difficulty on all Willpower rolls (pre-Modern Nights: proficient Daimonion users killed by masters)

description: Formerly Tzimisce scholars of clockworks/mechanisms; betrayed Tzimisce to join Tremere; skilled in magic and torture devices; maintain Tremere libraries/laboratories.
weakness: Inbreeding causes birth/personality defects; no Social trait above 2

description: Former farming family risen in power; capture worthy children to raise as chatterlings; extremely cruel and merciless.
weakness: Cannot have Humanity >3 or Conscience >2 (leads to insanity/depression/suicide/runaway); blood bound to at least one Seraphim; follow Path of Cathari or Death and the Soul

description: Created via experiments on Tzimisce revenants by Assamite Sorcerers; splintered globally with Castes debating usage of remaining members.
Thieves, assassins, and spies; originated from Thuggee sect serving Euthanatos of Tal'Mahe'Ra; many retain Humanity, some follow Path of the Scorched Heart.
weakness: Highly susceptible to blood bond (one drink suffices); often mix multiple Kindred blood for Vinculum

description: Witches, sorcerers, seers; liaisons to Verbena tradition; keepers of Enoch's gardens; study Magick (some Awakened); attractive and fashionable; aloof to Tal'Mahe'Ra; many retain Humanity or follow Path of Lilith.
weakness: Affected by moon phases (-2 disciplines New Moon, -1 Quarter, +2 Full); cannot be Embraced

description: Former mortal necromancers 'persuaded' via ritual into revenant status.
Debased fisher-folk serving an eccentric Ventrue in early modern Greece.
weakness: Compelled to serve descendants of Anushin-Rawan regardless of generation
